user.title: Set up PWM Fan
user.description: Pick your existing fan entity. A new fan entity will be created that controls speed via PWM (cycling on/off).

data.name: Name (optional)
data.gamma: Power curve exponent (0.1–2.0; <1 boosts low speeds)
data.source_speed: Source fan speed during ON phase (%)

abort.already_configured: This fan entity is already configured.

data.gamma: Power curve exponent (0.1–2.0; <1 boosts low speeds)
data.source_speed: Source fan speed during ON phase (%)
data.remote_off_id: Remote OFF id (leave blank to discover — check HA logs after pressing remote)
